rows.label: qst202010_msg001
rows.name:
Ooh, this is definitely
Bitter Choclit! Thank you.

rows.label: qst202010_msg002
rows.name:
Could you deliver the
ohagi to Musubi for me?.

rows.label: qst202010_msg003
rows.name: I'm sure she'll be pleased with it.

rows.label: qst202010_msg101
rows.name:
Musubi should be around the house.
Please give her the Ohagi.

rows.label: qst202010_msg201
rows.name:
I thought I had hidden it
somewhere in Superbia.

rows.label: qst202010_msg202
rows.name:
I'm sure it was somewhere
you can only reach at low tide.

rows.label: qst202010_msg301
rows.name:
My son is in Superbia,
and my daughter in Invidia.

rows.label: qst202010_msg302
rows.name:
Oh, right. When you visit
Invidia, could you buy me
more chocolate?
